message: Remove 2.0 dev cruft

message: Allow one more year of SHA1 in index v1 tests

title: Remove 2.0 dev cruft
message: Remove 2.0 dev cruft

title: Allow one more year of SHA1 in index v1 tests
message: Allow one more year of SHA1 in index v1 tests

title: Ignore failing test testGetReportingWeekStart()
message:
Ignore failing test testGetReportingWeekStart()

as this doesn't get fixed for years and keeps coming up.

See #2339

title: Adapt nightly builds to 2.0 basic
message: Adapt nightly builds to 2.0 basic

title: Don't claim no apps installed when all apps have issues
message: Don't claim no apps installed when all apps have issues

title: Handle disabled pre-approval
message:
Handle disabled pre-approval

Pre-approval can be disabled and we get STATUS_FAILURE_BLOCKED which should be sufficient. There's also a hidden official error code we don't use for now:
https://cs.android.com/android/platform/superproject/+/android-latest-release:frameworks/base/core/java/android/content/pm/PackageManager.java;l=2644;drc=905556173324d48059d4bae77408748a76497ac9

title: Fix top spacer when changing repos in app details
message: Fix top spacer when changing repos in app details

title: Show changelog of update (if existing) in app details
message:
Show changelog of update (if existing) in app details

previously only the changelog of the last installed version would get shown

title: Don't keep retrying sending ACRA reports
message:
Don't keep retrying sending ACRA reports

we send via email intent. this typically doesn't fail. if it fails, usually because there's no email program installed and then we shouldn't keep trying

title: Use proper Litecoin icon
message:
Use proper Litecoin icon

otherwise it looks strange if Bitcoin and Litecoin use the same icon

title: Only show repo errors if the repo is enabled
message:
Only show repo errors if the repo is enabled

this allows "ignoring" repo errors by disabling the repo

title: Make repo error text selectable
message:
Make repo error text selectable

so it can easily get copy and pasted

title: Remove int preferences hack, because library now supports Long
message: Remove int preferences hack, because library now supports Long

title: Take signer into account when finding installed version in app details
message:
Take signer into account when finding installed version in app details

and multiple candidates with the same version code exist

title: Improve behavior of updating our own app last
message:
Improve behavior of updating our own app last

Now our own app will show as in progress of getting updated. No more 'Update all' button will be shown after it has been pressed already.

title: Move new strings into a separate file
message:
Move new strings into a separate file

so they are not exposed to translators until they've undergone review

title: Reload updates after deleting a repository
message: Reload updates after deleting a repository

title: Adapt strings according to material design 3 guidelines
message:
Adapt strings according to material design 3 guidelines

see: https://m3.material.io/foundations/content-design/

title: Reload updates after deleting a repository
message: Reload updates after deleting a repository

title: Warn when we ignore external intent
message: Warn when we ignore external intent

title: Fix versionCode of nightly builds
message: Fix versionCode of nightly builds

title: Don't show an 'Open' button for ourselves
message: Don't show an 'Open' button for ourselves

title: Don't show an 'More' button for short descriptions
message: Don't show an 'More' button for short descriptions

title: Simplify dynamic feature graphic handling
message: Simplify dynamic feature graphic handling

title: Close search results when selecting an app
message:
Close search results when selecting an app

workaround for https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/471730911
still crashes sometimes, but at least back gesture works

title: Treat old crash reports differently
message:
Treat old crash reports differently

these may have happened when the user didn't interact with the app.

Also dismiss the crash report when user navigates back from crash screen.

title: Implement custom search screen
message:
Implement custom search screen

because the other one is still experimental and has severe crash bugs

title: update start-alpha-cycle.py for 2.0
message: update start-alpha-cycle.py for 2.0

title: Add changelog
message: Add changelog

title: Clean up top app bar search bar
message: Clean up top app bar search bar

title: Fix firstStart flag for people upgrading from 1.x
message:
Fix firstStart flag for people upgrading from 1.x

Also if first start is on, then just don't flag issues, but check for updates. This lowers the impact of the flag being wrong.

title: Show signer of installed version in technical info
message: Show signer of installed version in technical info

title: Don't get version name from git tag
message:
Don't get version name from git tag

as full and basic are out of sync and this would give full the version name of basic

title: Add version code to app details version item
message:
Add version code to app details version item

and improve some other version info, making it selectable, etc.

title: Don't show issue for apps with incompatible signer installed by other stores
message:
Don't show issue for apps with incompatible signer installed by other stores

The other store is likely to provide updates and this is a common use case with Aurora or Google Play, so people get flagged false positives.

message: Bump version to 2.0-alpha1

title: Try to get changelog picked up
message:
Try to get changelog picked up

default.txt changelog for the basic flavor isn't getting picked up by fdroidserver, so we try the version code instead

title: Improve manual repo update icon
message:
Improve manual repo update icon

Instead of the 'Update' icon, we now use 'Sync' which people are more familiar with
